类 BaseHelper

      protected static String getFieldValueFromMockForJson(String subTypeName, Map<String,String> tagsMap, String typeSimpleName)
      get field value from mock tag
      参数:
      subTypeName - subType name
      tagsMap - tags map
      typeSimpleName - type simple name
      返回:
      field value

    • isIgnoreCustomField

      protected static boolean isIgnoreCustomField(DocJavaField docField, boolean isResp, CustomField customRequestField, CustomField customResponseField)
      check custom field is ignored
      参数:
      docField - doc field
      isResp - is resp
      customRequestField - custom request field
      customResponseField - custom response field
      返回:
      boolean

      参数:

      projectBuilder - project builder
      isResp - is resp
      返回:

    • getFieldJsonAnnotationInfo

      protected static FieldJsonAnnotationInfo getFieldJsonAnnotationInfo(ProjectDocConfigBuilder projectBuilder, DocJavaField docField, boolean isResp, Set<String> groupClasses, Set<String> methodJsonViewClasses)
      Get a field JSON annotation information for a given field.
      参数:
      projectBuilder - the project builder
      docField - the doc of java field
      isResp - the response flag for the parameter
      groupClasses - the group classes
      methodJsonViewClasses - the method JSON view classes
      返回:
      the field JSON annotation information FieldJsonAnnotationInfo

    • getCustomFieldInfo

      protected static CustomFieldInfo getCustomFieldInfo(ProjectDocConfigBuilder projectBuilder, DocJavaField docField, boolean isResp, String simpleName, String fieldName)
      Get the custom field information for a given field.
      参数:
      projectBuilder - the project builder
      docField - the doc of java field
      isResp - the response flag for the parameter
      simpleName - the simple name of the field
      fieldName - the name of the field
      返回:
      the custom field information CustomFieldInfo
